text: Science has a clearer story about senescent cells than social media does. Senescent cells are damaged cells that stop dividing but refuse to die. They accumulate with age and contribute to aging and disease. Studies show that targeting these cells may improve health and longevity. But the science is still evolving. More research is needed. Follow for more insights into the science of our bodies.
